product.name: Linear
product.description: Project management software for software teams

competitors.name: Shortcut
competitors.browser_findings: Browser analysis failed: Browser agent completed without any steps or findings.

competitors.name: Monday.com
competitors.pricing_details: Free plan available with unlimited time, paid plans start with 10 seats and offer yearly or monthly payment options
strengths: All-in-one platform for various business needs
weaknesses: Complexity of the platform may overwhelm new users
Limited customization options for certain features
Dependence on AI technology may raise concerns about data privacy
competitors.market_position: Monday.com positions itself as a leading AI work platform that helps businesses scale their impact and expand their teams' capabilities
competitors.target_audience: Monday.com targets businesses of all sizes, from individuals to large enterprises, across various industries, including marketing, software development, and customer service

competitors.name: Zenhub
competitors.pricing_details: Free plan available, Teams plan at $8.33/user/month (billed yearly) or $12.50/user/month (billed monthly), Enterprise plan with custom pricing
weaknesses: Pricing for Enterprise plan not transparent
competitors.market_position: Zenhub positions itself as a comprehensive project management solution for software teams, integrating closely with GitHub
competitors.target_audience: Zenhub targets small to large software development teams, including those in enterprise environments, looking for advanced project management and collaboration tools

competitors.name: Jira
competitors.pricing_details: Free forever for 10 users, with paid upgrades available
features: Unlimited goals, projects, tasks, and forms
Backlog, list, board, timeline, calendar, and summary views
strengths: Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management
Strong customer base with notable clients like NASA, Visa, and Ford
weaknesses: Limited free plan with only 10 users
May require significant setup and configuration
Steep learning curve for new users
competitors.market_position: Jira is a leading collaborative work management solution, recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant
competitors.target_audience: Jira targets teams and organizations of all sizes, across various industries, including software development, marketing, IT, and more

competitors.name: ClickUp
competitors.pricing_details: Free forever plan with 60MB storage, unlimited tasks, and two-factor authentication; Unlimited plan at $7 per user/month billed yearly with additional features like unlimited spaces, folders, and forms
strengths: Free forever plan with generous features
weaknesses: Steep learning curve due to numerous features
May not fully replace specialized software for certain tasks
competitors.market_position: ClickUp positions itself as a comprehensive work solution that replaces multiple software tools with its all-in-one platform and AI-powered features
competitors.target_audience: ClickUp targets individuals, teams, and businesses looking for a unified platform to manage their work, projects, and productivity
